f0059","23c5913b-11b3-4124-bd7f-2dfb8a8cc8e7","90b9108a-639c-4572-8342-022f2e0389e5","5e36cb47-6078-4dac-a393-a70a84959d1b","fd591220-d399-492d-8e35-913ccf02a21b","66bad974-1d2a-4cfa-b87d-85dc7e739594","fee4f686-cd68-4ab0-9b30-594259239e25","f70d6e0d-c279-4dbc-87b0-f6efe4b48c3f","4b8f7274-dece-4e2a-98f8-68980ff970f2","c0213510-df00-4dc8-96bc-d6029e758819","e42d6f4f-b134-475a-a2c9-a9fff645d19b","3b841715-4bf9-42d1-93ab-c172fc33cae5","ac2e2203-830a-40e8-86d2-cff4bb2f45a9","de9c8e0b-aad4-422f-9432-6ca8cfee158d","0f787ff8-32fa-4193-9e84-86ae2873d0b0","ad9fea25-d745-4833-a021-b1e93958ddb4","75a1e6b1-5a14-44bb-a6bf-59644f24008c","e673c3a9-fa62-42d3-8521-ea6c6f45d1d6","f9c67074-1737-4ded-9118-9ac80d5508b6","b776dd34-d10e-40a6-b37e-93ffa2fba61d","413ed629-8e07-4cb1-b654-89c20718115e","5a0e9f78-30e8-4984-ad2a-8af725c0d885","868b4fe9-52c0-4c91-9bcc-18a075f126a8","527b8d59-9b22-4303-a905-859ef07e0c24","3a49983d-b24a-451b-9d06-c6d925402e6e","1cb016af-6daf-4651-bb9c-ad3724ac739d","a982f360-3e66-4341-aa40-4f986ecc157c","129c7089-b889-4105-8a2f-160e841513f7","6e1278e2-cda9-48ab-94b5-c09506ac462b","1fe3a34b-5637-4ae9-87a5-bccfb67fa7c9","fdede312-f168-42b8-950b-a8f28346b82a","a0feb987-ff57-4fe6-94aa-135c09125a6d","a3f21e52-4bcf-489e-996f-97d8272ca703","e1f0c6a0-a0f5-4516-91f2-d8fe49b1893d","362ed1b8-29a5-45fe-8202-1a81a27af8c1","8480d8a1-218e-4401-8d2e-63d636901f3f","9919ce3d-6cb5-462b-9136-a43224eb255c","9de721d7-c2bc-4064-bf51-dee32c856ee2","120cf8c3-a180-4ada-a6a8-4276a8b10c4b","baa20138-302d-4059-a009-1002fac2faff","a1cec514-423e-4999-b85d-00f42c019d4d","21a6bfe4-56ac-4844-b3cf-c38eeb6118e2","bc464b28-f986-47ec-8988-f2c39997d0be","f9875b9b-8288-4596-91ae-9296b4732f0e","b38e7898-14d8-47ce-97b3-87c055bfa772","a02f5bcc-5a95-41d2-a5fb-3ae2d1f17e69","c4132090-d612-4794-8de1-c505cca68b8b","be06f6cc-62bd-463c-9d61-930575453e85","456f5adc-84f3-4655-8052-7bef5841b5d9","53f29331-f2e7-4fb2-a97d-c4502b507335","f22c366d-d334-49ff-bcaa-deb75afb1b8a","a181bc70-1a6c-4c1b-ad7f-9ebd915a1b95","85b 4b5c-b5c0-4c3613003d2e","59356cc3-11e2-4f2b-abb3-5f8ee401fac8","a9dc3917-7631-4ec5-8122-64e930085ef1","4cce1e78-000e-4068-8aae-e00d16fe3ecd","92542019-f218-4917-bca5-066a3bd00c6c","b06c5bfc-7dae-4222-959d-079aa4563ea1","3286acf4-f1b7-496a-b494-5ef980cd1513","2b132b55-96a1-4790-8ead-738bfdedf927","a4b93433-b0ae-4a47-a0f4-b53b702c23e5","59138219-ca20-41b3-a2ad-279b2099e68e","f05ad648-0aec-4018-948f-9e11b5caac08","5be70e4e-9f21-4b74-9ae3-b03d2684508f","ebcc60fe-24da-4154-9457-50a4782285f7","ed272319-7f9d-405b-bb0b-ea7c785bc95e","6adf4465-d57f-4fd2-8683-a2c7fe217189","750e164a-9f61-4d4f-bb5c-c4c593fce698","87215025-06cb-4c6f-861f-3d36e1102d9d","363a063f-d1ba-4b5d-b69a-157031bd1542","2db7352f-3e49-4921-aa5b-b6431adaca10","b009d1be-fd9a-4140-845f-a9a06fe9e481","c0d4b3c7-f1c2-4e92-a084-2a2e40c595fb","3db6cc87-6fcf-4f14-af5d-83e691f1fcec","3365b063-a2fd-4612-aa88-cf3bb7182459","bb277dd4-ce73-4299-945b-397e5911e68b","ab465592-0270-45bc-b690-ac996e1c1187","aaebdb8e-de47-4a6b-ac12-d5c41a1c75a8","96cb51b5-70bb-4f64-9ec7-bd69e7590aa2","c165f824-962f-4a4a-8ece-a6a56a18a049","3dc7477c-d6c1-468e-b656-25986c265a9e","6e0dea4b-8cee-4537-90d3-6d935417be18","60d2aff8-d694-4d7e-97ad-4e293b34f3c7","38452f56-22fc-403c-b923-2c14bc03296c","0a515908-7c0a-4a79-970e-f7285717e988","f71befbc-5f72-4b8d-bfbf-1bc8a12c8817","5dfde820-80f4-4d5e-bc5f-3f39180644d8","2e6a5647-14e8-4730-bd10-a097f84205f9","3b17155a-6c77-4bf9-aa8a-6205293b557b","b8d32ffc-a4f9-498d-8bd1-4498f54de5e4","0eb44fac-254a-460b-a6d9-4ca8adbc8247","aa5ee742-d0d0-42fc-ad64-4571ee4c4e74","41a08d98-0c2a-4643-b709-4dafcdaa3f98","beef3a9e-770b-4a5b-b779-abe300a77958","e38e22d8-aa27-4bc0-91a7-f7bb64f13dcd","f0b9aa9b-96b3-484d-b35d-f668b7848db8","f022119e-ee80-4510-bb13-3b6aab94395a","c143ddc8-de8f-4294-863f-617264975595","2e35ed3f-c68d-4905-ac7c-9da2af370084","b1359e53-aa55-4e60-96b6-47e8e98df00c","b6526bb9-c5a1-476b-a0f6-1edf9490a84b","338c3e49-6c25-4580-9537-0fa9f8c4130d","71d5ef1b-fbb1-4bce-9700-9cca024bdc07","88e0e208-236c-49ea-8838-734c74be66b9"],"filename":"2025 Smith).pdf"},{"marker":"[S6]","chunkId":"cmpduj2f40001qy7njga78ojl:cmpiapf2l000tmzgfpy79jh20:cmpiapf9b000vmzgfpekon076:textract-base-v1:base-document-structure-v1:g1:48","documentId":"cmpiapf2l000tmzgfpy79jh20","pageStart":8,"pageEnd":8,"snippet":"ity number\nSpouse's name\n1 Adjusted gross income 1: 6,938\n2 Total tax 2\n3 Federal income tax withheld from Form(s) W-2 and Form(s) 1099 3: 56\n4 Amount you want refunded to you 4: 586\n5 Amount you owe 5\nPIN\nERO firm name:...","sourceBlockIds":["fe59f5c2-62bd-42ae-afae-4817a612eff8","47379e85-312f-4055-9469-cc700f719c8c","2758e07d-c963-4c5c-b2b5-03ee8462f8fd","7eb004b7-ea9f-4edd-a439-2b6ec668cb56","06897389-8207-46a7-8e90-e88a5cb896f8","698b4e3f-da50-4d0c-81de-2d5fbafeb3fa","0c2327b4-9658-4a7a-b870-5f64d73861f3","64c83517-2bfa-4cfd-af4a-91749ec6eb99","b1b5bd91-a294-4957-9092-ba003a0bc3bc","4b3c6e35-7deb-430b-a7bd-d0221c6454d1","9f1766db-bff2-4257-9c53-6c9ab2d7571c","4c2bfb72-a5ac-4ec3-a713-4012b062cc4a","d1a9c61d-b238-4f4c-aac7-f1ff5fd07b8e","263e2453-bd4d-43b7-9aab-7ed8ee0b3b84","d1446227-9602-4451-a5cc-6c7f5aa0a042","fb4994f6-8fe3-4af4-b56e-4d482461d93f","2ae86057-3c72-46da-a65c-b04700b99f02","46036db1-6d74-4656-bf46-3e24cbcbda51","39e54e17-35d1-4d89-b705-f292b66e4aad","74d212a5-c5ec-458c-8ce9-f2942bb1ac22","355e83dd-71e3-4d21-9b42-5a01cd2fbb66","253a53b3-3d0a-402b-848c-f5ebdfcf0f14","42002d59-2210-405e-9cbb-5bfb82257994","1f4f36ca-9f6b-4386-a31f-929c2e10a14b","6b0f683b-f3c1-4053-9a43-777e0de3e7a8","8af222a7-98a0-4c6a-8451-de468a285ede","9c41c08b-e7f3-40a7-bfc6-d4bb9961f9c6","2c17e5f9-55a7-4daa-8ec3-850c696b1f00","38d04be1-f7a3-4a9c-b1c4-590418979901","f164e442-0f8d-4d36-98d7-0af197fd7321","c163bb48-517c-4ad3-891f-d842400d8335","b4d4d4c7-ff05-4f9f-b9ed-62a56427e087","f5499db3-6018-4d48-8437-342df7b01cf9","7fd04759-e29f-404a-8bf6-676a1c6dbb77","9b529163-fd1e-426f-b0b2-0c430ff23fe9","06a6f987-bb3a-4d77-a8cf-2dc047b8cdf7","9c7f18fc-04c8-4b1c-98db-cd7a4d4ea8a9","dd9d89f3-580e-4036-9d30-3c4de90d9007","2e3eeca7-6295-4375-9ed4-443da477d3e5","b6522bd0-c3cb-45f3-945e-aa486cd52a9a","ad742e6d-db2d-4586-8439-b0a30f5f0fd9","3b3aeaaf-1dd1-456e-b818-7cdac91e69a1","986cb5cf-31ea-4b30-983f-333b053f846d","88555558-9543-4d54-8c17-83ace6103430","4c4b1375-d593-4441-92ca-5ebd697a55df","283819da-a537-4508-9bf7-25567e8d30bf","55e64e53-37ec-44bd-87e9-7888c1abe273","3ab70248-1646-49a3-bd2c-e5e498ecff9b","becc9106-87b3-4942-9a1b-88c4835fa461","5111d271-56d8-4c9f-ada5-9a1fd6cabbe5","cb9c213c-ca6f-437a-b2 901-9b6b-03985d77968f","a902e19a-bc85-4a7f-adbc-e931e638a588","bb84848b-0fb4-40e1-a822-216d25a903a2","a63300b4-4425-483a-9daf-df46b4df74bc","5d0705a8-32fe-46e6-bbd1-49d0258dddc3","3131b7ad-1f90-432f-8d96-cb0e7a2631e8","a0f70f12-c214-48ef-9ee9-5357fd39cc2d","c3d3c488-fd47-419d-bf40-16c2592ded90","a4b5bb8e-7758-43a3-8189-0f3e79315215","68dbbf68-bad4-4caa-be59-749199c8d9d3","38402eac-c100-401d-b63b-9e88d5ea6726","07e39737-2a39-4825-aa6b-f603a657ce31","7dad155a-c369-496c-8a94-734ffda30deb","9f812ef9-13a1-4081-b2fd-f64c5caa3b73","5e66f0f4-95fb-4e3f-8789-5b0e659204c4","f56e4890-6630-4647-a22a-965bc394729a","7c902931-f967-4831-9403-cc14abf6c0a6","336743e7-562a-40a7-811e-5e88216157e7","f1baef18-c562-45ac-8ca8-1b5a5eab7a9b","80fe2119-a689-48ab-8450-481e3ce5bd13","998a782e-11c9-478f-a5c6-363780259bc6","5a998caf-526a-43b0-ba3c-043e89e422f1","7760bb6d-eec3-41ee-960a-adbc2e8fab7b","7d6ad7d8-a872-476d-aff1-e8319427b56c","f73f9d0e-a0f0-445f-a884-80fb21bb75df","17a44043-c275-40d8-afdc-fee9ab06292a","a394da7b-7397-4fa2-8f07-7b01467c7fd7","0163ea05-7c1c-47cc-a0bb-0f59d49eba91","f78467e1-fae7-4100-9317-81335a26e02c","8cfde1d8-58eb-47d5-b9a8-449a5ccc8945","3b7b24c2-57c0-436c-a6e6-646b9d7d1ec2","7d39380f-3fb3-4b1b-8c84-2c40b232d4c2","10d89818-c877-474e-b1d2-50bd9dbe2f21","3078ac44-a31d-4bfa-a659-7745155681a7","e54f0271-f234-4949-8d14-89d531e05f13","5dc5138f-40d1-4a4a-84f0-3ab6f62e10d8","51c29a4b-fcdc-4893-b1be-f3dd00f41072","8c55d344-9b9e-4b11-8be8-9396f5940619","4a326212-116a-47a1-abd8-f484f6977b10","404f0d64-211f-448b-ab42-4dc617f72eb5","2a0e75c0-550b-4d31-bb41-c2a1086d1be2","56233365-ff95-40e2-bdaf-d8c4e03cebab","a14c7acd-c393-4af7-9826-deca53015f94","f89a245a-6592-48bf-ab86-177649587e45","4a3d0c7a-e38a-429b-a234-0233fc3ba774","7f14971c-7863-4955-a093-287c5a610ef0","897b0eec-a8d2-4c61-b435-b98fc01b879e","a7b71d5a-295b-4dbd-b314-5dd99b82fd42","9325b367-3804-46f4-b679-52f0d886c9b8","cccec5f6-f1d4-4149-a87b-ce07ac27760e","837960fa-59ce-458d-a3d6-51632076eec8","08775d44-947f-4a8e-9070-2b Social\nR3C3: security\nR3C4: wages\nR3C5:...","sourceBlockIds":["39704f5f-0590-4f47-be1a-42be30fa4107","dcb4df03-40ca-4c62-9043-89d36f193ad5","4be188fa-9b5b-489a-ae19-286674bad2a3","363862fb-3160-4492-9b9f-1ca5631b506a","cfb5561a-240f-42e9-88bc-ac6792f2dc51","58b9ea4a-2a49-47f2-b830-cf0f3755fdb2","1c1ba745-ccd9-482a-b62b-524942a8f180","5c3cc659-5d78-40bf-ab7c-404621bb5f86","02b5a182-d5a8-404b-89d5-b19cf4df011f","f958b668-f2cb-4566-8fe4-54bf3130ea9f","e3c9c217-3803-4d26-b4eb-3cb730df6a80","d2b6df90-fe9a-4a0f-80d9-5c518fc1c966","8b3fe013-b8d6-47dc-ad1c-b82dc3b90a97","1aeecde8-6b66-44c8-a450-9829394d147f","e1b2d023-6e4c-4163-b598-4b17e43222ef","01b6c630-60c7-4a02-a786-4c86671f8452","3c31b08e-2c3f-4ddb-9608-445dab8562e4","bf606156-3a16-4c93-bb93-662b50beab36","662578ca-6a62-44d1-8ccc-b38e79565a4e","b0cedac2-d0eb-454a-80a5-70b0a2834e22","ec9a72a7-1688-41b9-b02d-0c8151bbe0d1","f070d2a7-fb09-4034-b9fd-2511f90edd60","630b9ba8-904c-42e5-bd05-d5879154670e","901ad2d5-6a69-4a5b-b605-35a43ddcf413","670eafa6-3b05-4eed-99e0-0de802073fc8","1f767249-c1a1-4255-9155-846bb9c85852","d03a7ecb-4709-4114-8c39-be35ea5920df","f876f9b9-6b55-4486-9b19-cb4be34843cd","0bed2a4e-7c6f-4621-a87b-568e386940bd","01bba8e6-7395-4b22-ad2e-2c40c719d74d","b35f8e1d-00c5-4660-85ba-ed7efeb2137e","fe6e5179-1015-465e-9978-4d5bb110505e","263b164e-ab99-4a62-8de2-5a1a422f1ad4","9a343953-505c-488b-8133-4c6a64085b36","0ef12041-ee35-45c6-a040-6f9ebaeb8348","9604af3e-dbe2-4341-8cdb-09f61056d8c3","6660161b-9db4-429d-a86e-bea49ffe2e2f","62769c96-b6ce-4198-af83-a5229a2672ba","add87bb4-3e51-4658-954e-702bf8ad2116","85d7062f-8312-4c85-b956-06d0c2dc6893","2201836f-b5b7-483d-97fc-d054cb30eb74","78f9a5fd-2de4-4155-9139-c0bd70e6c4a9","6169dc01-7564-43c1-8f8e-206bedeb649e","ed57dc40-5a7d-41e5-b5cb-b9a5ecd433c8","9d1b394f-c409-4374-b6be-a1d53b217edf","6577823d-c172-4cf3-b9bb-49aaf9093354","a94638c9-5164-4634-9ac6-d2956beac63c","c41ee0e7-053a-4acb-87ad-9f3b327d8c6d","5fa269db-4aec-44f4-95e6-caa3d7e6fdae","f5486671-5939-452d-b84e-d072d18fa0be","7c080066-7014- Tax Return Documents (Whittaker Jordan).pdf"}]}}

The other two documents do not provide sufficient information regarding total wages."}
